gt_sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id GROUP BY T1.superhero_name ORDER BY COUNT(T2.hero_id) DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT s.superhero_name
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_power hp ON s.id = hp.hero_id
GROUP BY s.id, s.superhero_name
ORDER BY COUNT(hp.power_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the name of the superhero that has the most powers?
